mutations.description: Accept a lower threshold above the upper threshold.
Ignore the 12-bit ADC sample range limit.
Do not clear ADC status during initialization or recovery.
Do not save and disable the caller interrupt state before start.
Do not clear stale completion and fault latches before conversion start.
Treat an unrelated ADC status bit as a terminal conversion result.
Publish a terminal event without reading the ADC data exactly once.
Classify an analog-watchdog event as an in-window conversion.
Allow completion or watchdog handling to outrank an ADC overrun.
Fail to stop the ADC before clearing overrun state.
Leave the driver apparently healthy after a terminal overrun.
Wait one extra tick at the timeout deadline.
Use a direct timestamp comparison instead of elapsed unsigned arithmetic.
Do not clear pending ADC status when the foreground timeout wins.
Allow recovery to reconfigure a healthy ADC instance.
Return an event without clearing the one-event latch.
Start a new conversion before the prior terminal event is consumed.
